div.style: font-family: 'Noto Sans Ethiopic', 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; margin: 5px 20px 20px 20px; padding: 0;
font-weight: bold; font-size: 13pt; margin-bottom: 2px; text-decoration: underline;
border-bottom: 1px solid #000; height: 100%; min-height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end;
border-bottom: 1px solid #000; height: 100%; min-height: 22px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; margin-left: 4px;

div.div: Item Description and Suppliers List Table

t.t-value: o.rfq_ids.mapped('order_line').filtered(lambda l: l.product_id == product_line.product_id and not l.out_of_stock and l.price_subtotal > 0)

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid black; font-size: 10px;

th.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: center; width: 3%;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: center; width: 20%;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: center; width: 8%;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center; border-right: 1px dotted gray;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center;

td.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; vertical-align: middle;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center;
border: 1px solid black; border-right: 1px dotted gray; padding: 2px; text-align: right;

td.t-attf-style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: right; {{ winning_bg_color }}

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid black; font-size: 10px;

th.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: center; width: 3%;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: center; width: 15%;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: center; width: 8%;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center; border-right: 1px dotted gray;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center;

td.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; vertical-align: middle;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: center;
border: 1px solid black; border-right: 1px dotted gray; padding: 2px; text-align: right;

td.t-attf-style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: right; {{ winning_bg_color }}

td.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 2px; text-align: right; vertical-align: middle;

t.t-value: o.rfq_ids.mapped('order_line').filtered(lambda l: l.product_id == product_line.product_id and not l.out_of_stock and l.price_subtotal > 0)

img.style: max-height: 40px; max-width: 150px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid black;

td.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: center; font-weight: bold; background-color: #f0f0f0;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: right;

t.t-if: not (('withhold' in group_name or 'withholding' in group_name or 'withhold' in group_label or 'withholding' in group_label) or tax_amount < 0)
not (('withhold' in group_name or 'withholding' in group_name or 'withhold' in group_label or 'withholding' in group_label) or tax_amount < 0)

td.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: right;

t.t-if: ('withhold' in group_name or 'withholding' in group_name or 'withhold' in group_label or 'withholding' in group_label) or tax_amount < 0
('withhold' in group_name or 'withholding' in group_name or 'withhold' in group_label or 'withholding' in group_label) or tax_amount < 0

td.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: right;

t.t-if: ('withhold' in group_name or 'withholding' in group_name or 'withhold' in group_label or 'withholding' in group_label) or tax_amount < 0

td.style: border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; font-weight: bold;
border: 1px solid black; padding: 5px; text-align: right; font-weight: bold;

div.style: padding: 10px; border: 1px solid black; text-align: center; font-style: italic;

t.div: No winning suppliers found. Please evaluate bids first.
